items.acceptanceCriteria: The elevating/lifting equipment is painted safety yellow
The elevating/lifting equipment is painted safety yellow-and-black stripes on offshore facilities
Rated capacity of the elevating/lifting equipment is marked (Arabic & English)
A sign is posted warning the operator not to rely solely on any automatic device as a substitute for safe operating practice
Equipment documentation is available
Previous inspection reports are checked
Preventive Maintenance is established and dated records are maintained
Rated load is marked on the main structure or tagged
Lifting device has marking/tagging of manufacturer name, address, serial no., lifter weight
Values of cold current and rated voltage (when applicable) are correct
Product safety labels are attached and legible
All welds are not showing cracks or corrosion
Guards for moving parts are fitted where required
External power supply, electrical equipment and wiring is in place and undamaged (when applicable ) Saudi Aramco: Company Saudi Aramco: Company General Use
Surface of load is not covered in debris (where applicable )
Condition and operation of the controls are correct and functioning well
Condition and operation of the indicators and meters are correct and functioning well (where applicable)
Structural members are not deformed, cracked or excessively worn
There are no loose or missing guards, bolts and fasteners
Covers, stops or nameplates are not missing
Verify operation of mechanisms (where applicable )
Automatic hold-and-release mechanisms are adjusted and not interfering with operation (where appropriate )
Gears, pulleys and sheaves are not cracked or worn
Sprockets, bearings, chains or belts are no cracked or worn
Linkages and other mechanical parts do not have excessive wear
Hoist hooking points and load support clevises or pins do not have excessive wear
